action.reasoning: Observation: Val test showed LPIPS=0.0 (buggy) while eval showed 0.4542. The param_search had a tensor shape bug. Need to: 1) Fix val test to compute proper LPIPS, 2) Check GT background colors, 3) Test z-up vs y-up camera convention, 4) Find optimal settings. Analysis: The z-up vs y-up mismatch between data and TripoSR could be causing significant camera errors. Also, background color mismatch (black renders vs potentially white GT) could inflate LPIPS. Decision: Write comprehensive val test with correct tensor handling, test both coordinate systems and background colors, then update predict.py with best settings.
